meaning: vt.发展,发达,发扬,进步,逐步展开(情节,音乐主题,方程式等)洗印,显影vi.发展,生长,发育,逐步显示出来
examples: How fast would the disease develop?
We need to develop local industries.
These clashes could develop into open warfare.
No word yet on whether the independent Web software makers will develop for copiers.
Research conducted by the UKNC for the post-2015 Sustainable Development Goals helped develop this Bill.
